title: stelis hylophila
intro: Stelis hylophila, also known as the cloud-forest stelis, is a species of orchid native to Central America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which have been attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Stelis hylophila can be used to make infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
